subject: update DMaaP MR docker image version to 1.1.17

+++ grep robot

+++ kubectl --namespace onap exec nosy-sponge-robot-7df9c9f676-h96m9 -- bash -c 'ls -1q /share/logs/ | wc -l'
++ export GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=1
++ GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER=1
+++ printf %04d 1
++ OUTPUT_FOLDER=0001_ete_health-dmaap
++ DISPLAY_NUM=91
++ VARIABLEFILES='-V /share/config/robot_properties.py'
++ VARIABLES='-v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:9092'
